description: Our men`s veil cream contains aloe vera leaf extract, titanium dioxide.It conceals and brightens skin tone, is naturally refreshing, waterproof and sweatproof.It is easy to use: 1. Use moisturizers and sunscreen products for basic care. 2. Apply to the face using the five-point method. 3. Rub evenly and pat gently. 4. Finish the primer to naturally flatter your skin tone.And it improves the appearance of dryness, roughness, peeling, easily created and dark, oily, acne, fine lines aging.\
